capabilities.name: Upload assets
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Drag-drop + multi-file upload in MediaLibraryPage (handleUpload/handleDrop) with per-file progress. Each successful upload now also records metadata (filename, folder, MIME, size, dimensions probed client-side) into public.media_assets via upsert_media_asset RPC — powering alt-text / variants / where-used tracking.

capabilities.name: Folder organisation
capabilities.verify: media_browse folder param (pages/imports/templates/uploads/blog); folderFilter in MediaLibraryPage.tsx

capabilities.name: Search/filter
capabilities.verify: media_browse search param; searchQuery filename filter in MediaLibraryPage.tsx

capabilities.name: Image optimization/resize
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Client-side WebP conversion on upload (convertToWebP) PLUS server-side variants: media-optimize edge function decodes via ImageScript and uploads thumbnail (256px) + web (1280px) JPEG variants to <folder>/variants/, records them on media_assets.variants jsonb. Exposed as skill media_optimize (handler edge:media-optimize) and via the 'Generate' button in the media details sheet.

capabilities.name: Alt text management
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Per-asset alt text stored on media_assets.alt_text; edited via MediaDetailsSheet in the media library (Textarea + Save). Persisted via set_media_alt_text RPC (SECURITY DEFINER, service_role escape) and exposed as skill media_set_alt_text. Tile badges surface ALT / alt? state at a glance.

capabilities.name: Where-used tracking
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. find_media_usage(text) SECURITY DEFINER function scans pages.content_json, blog_posts.content_json + featured_image, kb_articles.answer_text/answer_json, and products.image_url for a needle. Surfaced in the details sheet as 'Used in (N)' with a list per source_type; exposed as skill media_find_usage for the agent.
